/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/network.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/network.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/network.dir/src/City.cpp.o CMakeFiles/network.dir/src/Edge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/network.dir/src/FileManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/network.dir/src/Graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/network.dir/src/GraphAlgorithms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/network.dir/src/Menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/network.dir/src/Utils.cpp.o -o network
